author: titan
description: ACT-R skill-compilation proposer (arch §12.3, PLAN_synthesis_engine_Phase2.md §2C.b, D-P2-8). Ships as a TIMER in Phase 2: at the dream boundary / genesis seal, FORK_READ the last 168h of procedural-fork TXs; if ≥10 traces accumulated, emit META_SKILL_COMPILATION_CANDIDATE so the (Phase 8) skill miner wakes and does the actual tool-call-shape grouping + recurrence detection (the matcher itself stays Phase 8 per arch §8.4 — the contract here is the TRIGGER that gates the wake, NOT the matcher). The GROUP_BY op landed in PLAN §2A is what Phase 8 will use INSIDE the miner; the count threshold here is the upstream gate.
